option.name: SCRIPT_TEXT
option.value: echo "== npm ==" && npm install && npm run build && npm test && echo "== python ==" && source .venv/bin/activate && python --version && echo "== package boundaries ==" && find packages agents runtimes shared -maxdepth 3 -type f | sort | head -100 && echo "== workflow docs ==" && find docs runtimes -name '*workflow*.md' -o -name '*workflows*.md' && echo "== git ==" && git status --short
